system_prompt:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

messages.content: {"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "1bc50547-7078-4cc3-9d99-46d01ddd81de", "article_id": "7a58c1c8-6e95-4f05-9067-f80775354c63", "source_name": "Who What Wear", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "product_recommendation", "brand": "", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Right away, I noticed some of my favorite brands are part of the markdowns: Camper, Salomon, Tory Burch, and Vagabond.", "Highlights were the Mary Janes from Camper, the XT-Whisper and Rx Moc 3.0 Slip-On Sneakers from Salomon, cap-toe flats and loafers from Tory Burch, and kitten heels from Vagabond."], "anchor_json": {"recommendation_context": "sale_shopping_guide", "product_category": "footwear", "availability_status": "selling_out_fast"}}]}
